C1.descriptionTemplate: Clementine obtains [Energy:Arg1] Aliemus. {Rouse}: The first Command Card Clementine plays each turn has its DMG, Shield, HP Healing, Aliemus, and Keyflare Regen take effect [Arg2] more times.

C2.descriptionTemplate: Deal [Damage:Arg1] DMG, Clementine obtains [Energy:Arg3] Aliemus. {Quasar}: Obtain [Power:Arg4] {STR}.

C3.descriptionTemplate: Obtain [Block:Arg1] Shield, Clementine obtains [Energy:Arg3] Aliemus. {Quasar}: Obtain [Power:Arg4] {STR}.

C4.descriptionTemplate: Deal [Damage:Arg1] DMG [AttackTimes:Arg2] times. Obtain [Arg3]% of Clementine's Keyflare Regen as Keyflare. {Quasar}: Obtain [Power:Arg5] {STR}.

C5.descriptionTemplate: Restore [Heal:Arg1] HP, temporarily remove {Madness} from all enemies and temporarily reduce their {STR⯆} by [Exhaustion:Arg3]. {Quasar}: Gain [Power:Arg4] {STR}.

Exalt.descriptionTemplate: Remove all your {Symbiosis}, then transform into either {Psychic Trauma} or {Phobic Fixation} on all enemies. Deal [Damage:Arg1] DMG to all enemies. Gain Keyflare equal to [Arg2]% of Clementine's Keyflare Regen.

OverExalt.descriptionTemplate: Gain {STR} equal to 50% of Clementine's ATK and Keyflare equivalent to 300% of Clementine's Keyflare Regen. Removing {Symbiosis} simultaneously triggers the effects of {Psychic Trauma} and {Phobic Fixation}.

T1.descriptionTemplate:
Clementine's Command Card gains 1 stack of {Symbiosis} after dealing Damage.
Each 1 Keyflare Regen attribute provided by Clementine and her equipped Wheel of Destiny & Covenant increases Crit. Rate and Crit. DMG by 0.35%.
At the start of the {Ultra Round}, remove all enemies' {Psychic Trauma} and {Phobic Fixation}. For each stack of {Psychic Trauma} removed from all enemies, gain 50 Keyflare; for each stack of {Phobic Fixation} removed from all enemies, other Awakeners gain 2 Aliemus.

T2.descriptionTemplate: Obtain [Arg1] Aliemus after the start of exploration.

T3.descriptionTemplate:
This talent is only effective in the {Astral Reign} stages.
This Awakener's CON, ATK, and DEF are increased by [Arg1]%, and they gain [Arg2] Keyflare upon their first {Rouse}.
The {STR} gained by all Awakeners increases by [Arg3]%.
When Clementine deals DMG to "Insectoid" enemies, she inflicts a {Bleed} effect equal to [Arg4]% of the DMG dealt. The first time each round Clementine provides a Shield or recovers HP, "Insectoid" enemies temporarily lose {STR} equal to [Arg5]% of Clementine's DEF.

E1.descriptionTemplate: Obtain 5 stacks of {Symbiosis} when the battle begins. Base DMG of {Lifeform Reconstruction} increases by 20%.

E2.descriptionTemplate: {Lifeform Reconstruction} additionally gains 200% of Clementine's Keyflare Regen as Keyflare. For each stack of {Symbiosis} removed, Clementine's Base DMG increases by 3%. At the end of each battle, Clementine's Base DMG increases by 25%.

upgradePatches.descriptionTemplate: Remove all {Symbiosis} from self, and choose to convert them into {Psychic Trauma} or {Phobic Fixation} for all enemies, increasing Clementine's Base DMG by 3% for each stack removed. Deal [Damage:Arg1] DMG to all enemies. Gain Keyflare equal to [Arg2]% of Clementine's Keyflare Regen.

E3.descriptionTemplate: At turn end, obtain 2 stacks of {Symbiosis}. The stacking limit for {Symbiosis}, {Psychic Trauma}, and {Phobic Fixation} is increased to 15.

upgradePatches.descriptionTemplate: Under the erosion of the Hive, your fears are laid bare. For each stack, DMG dealt this turn reduces by 3%, stacking up to 15 stacks.
Under the erosion of the Hive, your fears are laid bare. For each stack, DMG taken this turn increases by 3%, stacking up to 15 stacks.

Her emotions, cognition, and everything else are eternally linked to the Hive Will. "Empathy" can be transformed into debuff effects by Clementine's Exalt {Lifeform Reconstruction}, stacking up to 15 stacks.
